privileged_info_summary: The task 'recover_and_purge_trash@1' is a medium-difficulty FreeScout helpdesk simulation task with synthetic data. The target ticket subject is 'Signed Contract - Q3 2024', which must be recovered from trash. Three junk subjects must be permanently deleted: 'SEO Proposal', 'You won!', and 'Undelivered Mail'. The task requires a minimum score of 90 to pass, which requires: preserving the target ticket (40 pts), restoring it to active status (20 pts), permanently deleting all junk items (20 pts), and emptying the trash folder entirely (20 pts).
